description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the template templates/release-tools-ring-deployment.yml from the project gitlab-com/gl-infra/cells/tissue with inputs allow_failure set to true, amp_environment set to cellsprod, and ring set to 0. Add a workflow rule so the pipeline only runs when $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE equals "parent_pipeline". No additional jobs, stages, or variables are defined directly in this file.
